settings.heading: Returns & Refunds
settings.body:
Your satisfaction is important to us. If something isn't right, we'll make it right.

Return Window

You have 14 days from delivery to request a return. Items must be in the same condition as received.

Eligible Items

Singles, graded cards, and loose cartridges are eligible for return if the item does not match the listed condition or description.

Non-Returnable Items

Sealed products (booster packs, booster boxes, ETBs) cannot be returned once opened. Digital codes are non-refundable.

How to Return

Contact us at support@firsteditionco.com with your order number and photos of the item. We'll provide a return shipping label within 24 hours.

Refunds

Once we receive and inspect the return, refunds are processed within 3–5 business days to your original payment method.
